aboutUs.story1: Muzicalist was created to solve a simple problem: finding talented and reliable musicians for events was difficult, time-consuming, and often uncertain.
aboutUs.story2: At the same time, many talented artists struggled to promote themselves professionally and connect with the right opportunities.
aboutUs.story3: Muzicalist bridges this gap — bringing artists and clients together in one trusted, professional platform.
aboutUs.ourGoalText: To make discovering musical talent easier, faster, and more reliable.

clients.discover1: Filter by category, location, and experience
clients.everyEvent1: Wedding, private parties, and corporate events
clients.everyEvent2: Explore multiple music styles and artist types

excellence.title: Excellence in Music
excellence.description: We connect only the best talented musical artists, ensuring clients receive outstanding performances.

community.title: Community First
community.description: Building a vibrant community where artists can thrive and clients can find the best voices.

platform.title: Professional Platform
platform.description: A specialized platform designed for professional artists and event organizers to connect and collaborate.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.description: Designed for skilled musicians and clients seeking reliable, high-quality entertainment.

aboutUs.visionLine1: Our vision is to become the world's leading platform for musical talent.
aboutUs.visionLine2: We aim to connect musical talent with artists and create new opportunities for musicians and their clients.
aboutUs.joinSubtitle: Find the perfect artist or grow your music career.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.sec1Intro: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, update your profile, or communicate with us. This may include:
privacyPolicy.sec1Item1: Name, email address, and phone number
privacyPolicy.sec1Item5: Communications and messages sent through the platform
privacyPolicy.sec2Intro: We use the information we collect to:
privacyPolicy.sec2Item1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
privacyPolicy.sec2Item3: Send you technical notices and support messages
privacyPolicy.sec2Item4: Respond to your comments and questions
privacyPolicy.sec2Item5: Monitor and analyze trends and usage
privacyPolicy.sec3Intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following circumstances:
privacyPolicy.sec3Item1: With your consent or at your direction
privacyPolicy.sec3Item2: With service providers who assist in our operations
privacyPolicy.sec3Item4: To protect the rights and safety of our users
privacyPolicy.sec4Body: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacyPolicy.sec5Item1: Access and receive a copy of your personal data
privacyPolicy.sec5Item2: Rectify or update your personal information
privacyPolicy.sec5Item3: Request deletion of your account and data
privacyPolicy.sec5Item4: Object to processing of your personal data
privacyPolicy.sec6Body: We use cookies and similar technologies to collect information about your browsing activities and to personalize your experience. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
privacyPolicy.sec7Body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
privacyPolicy.sec8Body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.sec1Body: By accessing and using Muzicalist, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.
termsOfService.sec2Body: Muzicalist is a platform that connects musical artists with clients seeking entertainment services. We provide tools for artists to showcase their talents and for clients to discover and book performers for events.
termsOfService.sec3Item1: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account
termsOfService.sec3Item2: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account
termsOfService.sec3Item3: You must provide accurate and complete information
termsOfService.sec3Item4: You may not use another person's account without permission
termsOfService.sec3Item5: You are responsible for all activities under your account
termsOfService.sec4Intro: As an artist on our platform, you agree to:
termsOfService.sec4Item1: Provide accurate information about your skills and experience
termsOfService.sec4Item5: Only upload content you have rights to use
termsOfService.sec5Intro: As a user of our platform, you agree to:
termsOfService.sec5Item1: Provide accurate event details when making inquiries
termsOfService.sec5Item3: Honor booking agreements and payment terms
termsOfService.sec5Item4: Not use the platform for unlawful purposes
termsOfService.sec6Item1: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
termsOfService.sec6Item2: Harass, abuse, or harm other users
termsOfService.sec6Item3: Post false, misleading, or fraudulent content
termsOfService.sec6Item5: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the platform
termsOfService.sec6Item6: Use automated systems to access the service without permission
termsOfService.sec7Body: You retain ownership of content you upload to the platform. By uploading content, you grant us a non-exclusive license to use, display, and distribute your content in connection with our services.
termsOfService.sec8Body: Muzicalist acts as a platform connecting artists and clients. We are not responsible for the quality of services provided by artists or the conduct of users. We do not guarantee any specific outcomes from using our platform.
termsOfService.sec9Body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violations of these terms or for any other reason at our discretion. You may also delete your account at any time through your account settings.
termsOfService.sec10Body: We may modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms. We will notify users of significant changes via email or platform notification.
termsOfService.sec11Body: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at

helpSupport.title: Help & Support
helpSupport.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about using Muzicalist.
helpSupport.reportSubtitle: Send us feedback or report a problem
helpSupport.errorEmpty: Please write your report before sending.
helpSupport.reportThanks: Thank you for your feedback. We'll review it shortly.

faq.gs1q: How do I create an account?
faq.gs1a: Go to the Register page and choose between an Artist account or a User account. Artists can create profiles, showcase their work, and receive bookings. Users can browse artists, follow them, and post event announcements.
faq.gs2q: What's the difference between an Artist and a User account?
faq.gs2a: Artists get a full profile with gallery, bio, social links, booking calendar, and analytics. Users can browse artists, follow their favorites, post event announcements, and send messages to artists.
faq.gs3a: Click the Login button and enter the email and password you used during registration. Make sure to verify your email first if you haven't already.
faq.ap1q: How do I edit my artist profile?
faq.ap1a: Navigate to your Dashboard and go to the Profile tab. There you can update your stage name, bio, specialization, instruments, music genres, social media links, avatar, gallery, and more.
faq.ap2q: How do I add photos and videos to my gallery?
faq.ap2a: From your Dashboard's Profile tab, scroll down to the Gallery section. You can upload images and add YouTube video links to showcase your performances.
faq.ap3a: You can choose from Singer, Instrumentalist, DJ, or Band as your specialization.
faq.ap4q: Can I hide my contact information?
faq.ap4a: Yes, from your Dashboard Settings you can toggle the visibility of your email and phone number on your public profile.
faq.bk1a: Users or event organizers can send you a booking request through your artist profile. You'll receive a notification and can accept or decline the request from your Dashboard.
faq.bk2q: How do I manage my calendar?
faq.bk2a: From your Dashboard, access the Calendar tab to view and manage your booked events, mark dates as unavailable, and keep track of upcoming performances.
faq.bk3a: Yes, you can set an estimated price range on your profile to give potential clients an idea of your rates.
faq.po1q: How do I create a post?
faq.po1a: Go to the Posts page and use the post creation form at the top. You can write text content and attach images or videos to share with your followers.
faq.po2a: Any logged-in user can like posts on the Posts page. The total like count is displayed on each post.
faq.po3a: Announcements are event opportunities posted by users looking for artists. Browse the Announcements page to find gigs, apply to events, and connect with organizers.
faq.ms1q: How do I message an artist?
faq.ms1a: Visit an artist's profile and click the message button. This creates a conversation where you can discuss event details, pricing, and availability. You can also contact organizers regarding their announcements.
faq.ms2a: You receive notifications for new messages, booking requests, followers, reviews, and other interactions. Check the bell icon in the navigation to view your notifications.
faq.ms3a: Yes, you can delete conversations from your Messages page. The conversation will be hidden from your view. This also applies to conversations regarding announcements.
faq.se1a: Use the Search page to find artists by name, specialization, or location. You can also browse by Categories, Countries, or Regions from the sidebar navigation.
faq.se2a: The Leaderboard ranks artists based on their activity, reviews, and engagement. It's a great way to discover top-performing artists on the platform.
faq.se3q: Can I filter artists by country or region?
faq.se3a: Yes, use the Countries or Regions pages to browse artists filtered by their location.
faq.rv1q: How do I leave a review?
faq.rv1a: Visit an artist's profile and scroll to the Reviews section. You can rate the artist from 1 to 5 stars and leave a written comment about your experience.
faq.rv2a: If you believe a review violates our guidelines, you can report it using the report button. Our team will review the report and take appropriate action.
faq.sb1a: Muzicalist offers Free, Standard, and Premium plans. Each tier unlocks additional features like priority placement, advanced analytics, and premium badges.
faq.sb2q: How do I upgrade my plan?
faq.sb2a: Go to the My Plan page from the sidebar navigation. There you can compare plans and upgrade to Standard or Premium.
faq.sb3a: Premium artists get a verified badge, top placement in search results, advanced analytics, priority in the Leaderboard, and access to exclusive features on the Posts page.
faq.sf1q: How do I report inappropriate content?
faq.sf1a: Use the report button available on profiles, posts, and reviews. Describe the issue and our team will investigate.
faq.sf2a: We take privacy seriously. You can control what information is visible on your profile through your Settings. Read our Privacy Policy for full details.
